text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm heading toward the<n>school gates
after school...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...One more minute until the scheduled<n>time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I wait around for Falcon any longer,<n>I might not
make it to Oi Racecourse<n>on time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If everything is to proceed without<n>delay,
punctuality is essential. No<n>matter the
circumstances, schedules<n>must be respected...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm-hm-hmm! ♪ I can't wait for<n>tonight's
performance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Falcon. Perfect timing. I've got a<n>question to
ask you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What? A question for meee? All right!<n>My
measurements are— ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is unnecessary. Are you well<n>acquainted
with Oi Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to watch the eleventh race<n>today. I
plan to leave the academy at<n>6:00 p.m. What is
the shortest route<n>from the stat—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Did you say six?! That's a horrible<n>idea! It's not
Tokyo Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot of transfers, plus it's<n>rush hour.
Even the smallest thing will<n>make you late!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I guess you haven't been to<n>Oi much.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well don't you worry, 'cause Falcowill be your guide! ☆ I'll teach you toappreciate and enjoy a racethere!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Really? But don't you have your own<n>plans
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's fiiiiine! ♪ Let me do something<n>nice for you
every once in a while! ☆ I<n>know the best seat in
the house! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...She should be here soon. I'll wait<n>for one more
minute.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Flaaash! Sorry! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I almost blew it, but I got here<n>just in time,
right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No. You're two seconds late.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Which means we need to run to Oi.<n>That way we
can get good seats to<n>watch the race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What?! R-run there?! But it was only<n>two
seconds!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash and Smart Falcon take<n>off running
with smiles on their faces.
